'''Doornik-628B''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Doornik-628 system]], which was located in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]],<ref name="Temples and Tybis" /> a part of [[the Negs]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Doornik-628]] and was itself circled by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Doornik-628B, like its neighbor [[Doornik-628C]], featured [[Acid/Legends|acidic]] [[Cloud/Legends|clouds]].<ref name="Temples and Tybis" />

==Behind the scenes==
Doornik-628B was mentioned in "J't'p'tan: Temples and Tybis," an article written by [[Jason Fry]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[January 30]], [[2003]].<ref name="Temples and Tybis" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Doornik-628 [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Doornik-628B, in grid square K-10.<ref name="TEA" />
